subject: flagship acceptance + skipped-source coverage failure
note: ADVISORY per-task loadout review. Facts cite records; items under optimization_opportunities are judgments to weigh at slice start, not requirements.

reuse: breakout/verifier.mjs verdict-on-facts (acceptance decided on disk facts, not claims)
the per-slice deterministic gate pattern (docs/runs/clotho-impl-slice-4a/gate.mjs -> gate-result.json 'meets')
review: the slice-4a per-round review convention (roundN-review-{seat}.json + summary) for the flagship run's evidence trail

optimization_opportunities: If the flagship run needs external connectors or docs, graduate this review into gate-enforced capability packets on the slice dossier (--capabilities; see ../CONTRACTS/capability-packet.json) instead of ad hoc setup.
The skipped-source coverage failure is a designed fail-closed outcome — record it in the slice's FAILURE-MODES rather than treating the first occurrence as a bug.
